# 🧬 Transcedens Core - Pull Request

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR does. Include any relevant issue numbers (e.g., `fixes #123`).

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (no code changes)

## Cognitive Architecture Checklist
- [ ] **System Separation**: Does this change respect the "Thinking, Fast and Slow" separation? (System 1/System 2)?
- [ ] **Latency Awareness**: Is the performance impact handled? (System 1 < 100ms?)
- [ ] **Lite Mode**: Have you verified these changes work in `DB_MODE=LITE`?
- [ ] **Dependencies**: Are any new dependencies added? (If yes, why are they necessary?)

## Screenshots/Recordings (if applicable)
If your PR changes the way NPCs respond or interact, please provide a log or recording.

## Final Verification
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.

---
*Thank you for contributing to Transcedens Core!*
